title: Verify the display of workout plans by difficulty level
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Full Body Workout' screen. | Verify that the screen displays workout plans categorized by difficulty levels: Easy, Medium, and Hard.
expected_result: The workout plans are displayed in a vertical list, each with an icon and a label corresponding to the difficulty level.

title: Navigate back to the previous screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Full Body Workout' screen. | Click on the back arrow in the header to navigate back to the previous screen.
expected_result: The user is navigated back to the previous screen.

title: Verify the navigation bar at the bottom
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Full Body Workout' screen. | Verify that the navigation bar at the bottom contains a back arrow, a circle, and a square icon.
expected_result: The navigation bar at the bottom is visible and contains the expected icons.

title: Verify the status bar icons and time
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Full Body Workout' screen. | Verify that the status bar at the top shows various icons and the time (4:57).
expected_result: The status bar at the top displays various icons and the time (4:57).

title: Select a workout plan
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Full Body Workout' screen. | Select a workout plan from the list by tapping on it.
expected_result: The selected workout plan is displayed in detail on the next screen.

title: Verify data persistence
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Full Body Workout' screen. | Select a workout plan. | Navigate to the home screen and back to the 'Full Body Workout' screen. | Verify that the selected workout plan is still displayed.
expected_result: The selected workout plan is still displayed on the 'Full Body Workout' screen.

title: Verify accessibility/usability
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Full Body Workout' screen. | Verify that the screen is accessible and usable for users with disabilities.
expected_result: The screen is accessible and usable for users with disabilities.

title: Verify interruption/resume
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Full Body Workout' screen. | Simulate an interruption (e.g., phone call, notification). | Resume the app and verify that the 'Full Body Workout' screen is still displayed.
expected_result: The 'Full Body Workout' screen is still displayed after the interruption.
